# Zyro — Internship Management Platform
> Zyro connects students with real internship opportunities, experienced mentors, and blockchain-verified digital certificates.

## Docs
- Docs: https://github.com/ilyaskhan12Q/ZYR0

## Overview
Zyro is a modern Internship & Workforce Readiness Platform that bridges the gap between academic education and professional industry experience. Students complete real-world projects, submit work through public GitHub repositories, receive mentor feedback, and earn trusted digital credentials.

## Features
- Internship Listings & Applications
- Offer Letter Management
- Internship Workspace & Task Management
- GitHub Repository Submission
- Mentor Review & Feedback
- Progress Tracking
- Digital Certificates with Blockchain Verification
- Analytics & Reporting

## Tech Stack
- TypeScript, React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Supabase
